entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The legume crop under study for yield and trait stability across generations

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The productivity of the plant, including seed yield per plant and per plot

entities.name: DAYS TO 50% FLOWERING
entities.description: The number of days required for 50% of the plants to reach the flowering stage

entities.name: MATURITY
entities.description: The time taken for the crop to reach full physiological maturity

entities.name: SEED WEIGHT
entities.description: The mass of the seeds produced by the plant

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: The vertical growth measurement of the plant

entities.name: PRIMARY BRANCHES
entities.description: The number of main branches emerging from the plant stem

entities.name: SECONDARY BRANCHES
entities.description: The number of branches emerging from the primary branches

entities.name: NUMBER OF PODS PER PLANT
entities.description: The total count of pods produced by a single plant

entities.name: NUMBER OF SEEDS PER PLANT
entities.description: The total count of seeds produced by a single plant

entities.name: CORRELATION STUDIES
entities.description: Statistical analysis used to determine the association between different traits and generations

entities.name: PATH COEFFICIENT ANALYSIS
entities.description: Statistical method used to determine the direct and indirect effects of traits on yield

entities.name: SELECTION
entities.description: The process of choosing superior genotypes for subsequent generations

entities.name: SPACING
entities.description: The distance between plants, specifically wide (60cm x 20cm) and close (30cm x 10cm)

entities.name: F2 GENERATION
entities.description: The second filial generation in the breeding process

entities.name: F3 GENERATION
entities.description: The third filial generation in the breeding process

entities.name: F4 GENERATION
entities.description: The fourth filial generation in the breeding process

entities.name: F5 GENERATION
entities.description: The fifth filial generation in the breeding process

entities.name: F6 GENERATION
entities.description: The sixth filial generation in the breeding process
